title: Nephi Zaugg’s CV
text:
Computer Scientist, BYU-Idaho Student.

Github Repo



Studying Computer Science at Brigham Young University Idaho.


Backend development, problem solving, learning, python, and c#.



Backend development, computer systems, foundational development.




2020 Tillamook High School/ORVED
2023 - now Brigham Young University Idaho

Computer Science Major




2018 Cafe Associate, Tillamook Creamery (503 815 1300) - Took customer orders and provided assistance.
2019-2021 | 2025-Present Machine Operator/Packager, Stowaway Gourmet (385 242 4651) - Worked to package food and maintain a clean and dry environment. - Professional Dish Washer.
2022 Unarmed Security Guard, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints (801 722 5001) - Oversaw film set during the night.
2023 Retail Warehouse Associate, Tillamook Creamery (503 815 1300) - Priced items for the Creamery Visitor’s Center.
2024 IT Assistant, Tillamook Family Counseling Center - Maintained IT infrastructure and helped with projects.
